history.text: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
The image displays a user interface for what appears to be an anime streaming or community app. The top section shows the user's profile with their name "Dzul ft luna Skyy", level "22.758", and experience points. There's also a "Premium" status indicating "258,18 Hari" (258.18 Days). Below that, a featured anime is displayed with the title "Tsuihou sareta Tensei Juukishi wa Game Chishiki de Musou suru" and a view count of "395.864". Further down, there's a search bar to "Cari Anime Di Sini" (Search Anime Here) and a "GLOBAL CHAT" section. The bottom navigation bar shows icons for "Home", a calendar, a clock, and a profile picture. The overall content is related to anime and user engagement within the app, with no explicit or suggestive material present.
